headerDisplay: Connects your Popur X5 litter box to HomeKit through the Popur cloud. Enter the same email and password you use in the Popur app.
footerDisplay: This is an unofficial plugin that talks to Popur's cloud (cloud.popur.com.cn). It is not affiliated with Popur and may break if the cloud API changes.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to refresh status from the Popur cloud.
